nasb.text: And he said to him, ‘Well done, good slave, because you have been faithful in a very little thing, you are to be in authority over ten cities.’

esv.text: And he said to him, ‘Well done, good servant!  Because you have been faithful in a very little, you shall have authority over ten cities.’

cnv.text: 主人說：‘好，良善的僕人，你既然在最小的事上忠心，可以有權管理十座城。’

ccb.text: “主人说，‘好，你真是个好奴仆！你既然在小事上忠心，就派你管理十座城。’

csbs.text: “主人对他说：‘做得好，好奴仆！因为你在最小的事上忠心，你就有权掌管十个城。’
